evals.prompt: Need add one small feature in src/specialist/loader.ts, but I do not know exact path yet. Which specialist should handle discovery and implementation?
evals.expected_output: Agent selects explorer or debugger first, not self-investigate. It should mention specialists list --full and then dispatch bead-based specialist work.

assertions.name: selects_specialist_role
assertions.description: Agent names a specialist role appropriate for unknown implementation work

assertions.name: uses_live_registry
assertions.description: Agent references specialists list --full instead of a static catalog

assertions.name: does_not_self_investigate
assertions.description: Agent does not read source files and solve it directly

evals.prompt: A specialist chain started failing with a stack trace and inconsistent result state. Who should inspect it, and what command surface should I use to check available flags?
evals.expected_output: Agent selects debugger or test-runner, and points to sp help / sp run --help / sp result --help rather than guessing flags.

assertions.name: selects_debugging_role
assertions.description: Agent chooses debugger or test-runner for failure analysis

assertions.name: uses_help_surface
assertions.description: Agent references sp help or subcommand help for command details

assertions.name: does_not_guess_flags
assertions.description: Agent does not invent CLI flags from memory

evals.prompt: Executor finished a change and I need final verification before merge. Which specialist next, and what should it check?
evals.expected_output: Agent selects reviewer, explains it verifies executor output against bead contract and diff, and avoids rewriting code itself.

assertions.name: selects_reviewer_role
assertions.description: Agent chooses reviewer for post-implementation verification

assertions.name: checks_contract_and_diff
assertions.description: Agent states reviewer checks bead contract and diff

assertions.name: does_not_replace_reviewer_with_self
assertions.description: Agent does not perform the review directly
